Travel Smart · Travel Wise

Meet Mr Wise.

I'm Alphonso Wise — owner of Mr Wise Travels LLC. I started this agency on a simple idea: every trip should feel personal. Not a package. Not a checklist. A real experience — the kind you remember twenty years from now.

Whether you're traveling solo, planning a couples' getaway, or rolling with a whole group of friends, I handle the moving pieces — flights, accommodations, ground transport, excursions — so you can show up, look good, and have the time of your life.

Alphonso Wise
Owner & Travel Agent · Wise Travels LLC
Featured Group Trips

Two destinations.
One unforgettable year.

Limited spots. Generous inclusions. Hand-picked experiences in two of the world's most iconic cities.

September 24 – 30, 2026
Rio de Janeiro
Brazil · 7 Days
The Baltimore Brazilian Takeover 2026

Sunsets over Copacabana, Christ the Redeemer at sunrise, and a takeover trip that brings the energy of Baltimore to the streets of Rio. Includes a game ticket and curated group excursions.

  • Roundtrip airfare from IAD to GIG
  • Accommodations + daily breakfast
  • Group excursions + ground transport
  • Game ticket + swag box
  • All taxes and fees
Starting at $3,594 $300 deposit · per person
Book Trip
January 26 – February 3, 2027
Dubai
United Arab Emirates · 9 Days
Dubai Dreams 2027

Luxury accommodations, daily activities, and full meal service in the city of glass towers and golden dunes. A nine-day itinerary with private transport, an English-speaking guide, and the Dubai Dreams gift box.

  • Roundtrip airfare from JFK to DXB
  • Luxury accommodations (King or 2 Queens)
  • Daily breakfast, lunch, and dinner
  • Private ground transport + tour guide
  • Daily activities + Dubai Dreams gift box
Starting at $3,498 $200 deposit · per person

Why Wise Travels

Pack the bags.
I'll handle the rest.

You shouldn't have to be a logistics expert to take a great trip. That's my job.

Curated Destinations

From Rio's beaches to the dunes of Dubai — every itinerary is hand-built for places worth flying to.

Group + Solo Friendly

Roll with friends, family, or solo with our roommate matching. Trips designed to bring people together.

Full-Service Planning

Flights, hotels, ground transport, excursions, even swag. Show up at the airport and let the trip take care of itself.

Get In Touch

Ready to plan something?

Whether you've got a destination in mind or you just need someone to point you in the right direction, reach out. The first conversation is free, and there's no pressure to book.

Phone or email works — I usually respond within a day.
